name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Friend, Can I count on you?
body:
Our campaign is about 250 donors shy of our goal. Friend, can I count on you? *****Quick Update*****

Our campaign is about 250 donors shy of our goal. **Can I count on you today to make a quick online contribution?**

**[Please follow this link to donate right now.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28385840:27253803019:m:1:877327319:3E866A6CE13BCA0964C15E9434459FAA:r)**

Thanks.

\- Lindsey

| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

I need your help.

**Our campaign has set a goal of activating 500 donors to my presidential campaign by June 15th. Can I count on your support?**

[**Follow this link to chip in whatever you can afford to give right now**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28385840:27253803019:m:1:877327319:3E866A6CE13BCA0964C15E9434459FAA:r).

**For me to have a chance in what is sure to be a hard fought Republican primary and general election contest, my campaign must have strong, solid backing from voters all across America.**

That's why I am reaching out to you right now. Friend, I'm ready to be Commander in Chief on Day One, but I cannot win this race unless I have your support.

**[Will you please help us reach our goal of activating 500 donors by Monday, June 15th?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28385840:27253803019:m:1:877327319:3E866A6CE13BCA0964C15E9434459FAA:r)**

I know the road ahead will not be easy, but I take comfort in knowing I have your support.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **500 donors by June 15th**... **we can only reach this goal if we have your immediate support today.** **[Please become a donor to my presidential campaign by making a secure online donation of any amount!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28385840:27253803019:m:1:877327319:3E866A6CE13BCA0964C15E9434459FAA:r)** Thanks so much.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28385840:27253803019:m:1:877327319:3E866A6CE13BCA0964C15E9434459FAA:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW8Yhyz1nN).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW8Yhyz1nN) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW8Yhyz1nN)

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: What would the first 100 days of a Cruz administration look like?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the following address: http://act.tedcruz.org/index.php/email/emailWebview?mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonvqTOZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4DTMFkI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D

Hello Friend,

Earlier this week, Ted spoke with the Washington Post's James Hohmann <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/icymi-cruz-in-the-washington-post-if-you-live-by-the-pen-you-die-by-the-pen/> about what the first 100 days of a Cruz administration might look like -- and we hope you're as excited for them as we are! With regard to the current administration, Ted noted, “If you live by the pen, you die by the pen. Everything put in place by executive order can be undone by executive order,” and that he'd use the transition put together a team to review every executive action made by President Obama and then rescind each and every one that exceeds "the Constitutional and legal authority of the President."

He also said he'd take quick action to ensure Iran doesn't acquire nuclear weapons, take steps to strengthen our relationship with Israel, push far-reaching tax and regulatory reform -- including a full repeal of Obamacare, and fight to put an end to Common Core. Read more from the interview here <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/icymi-cruz-in-the-washington-post-if-you-live-by-the-pen-you-die-by-the-pen/>.

This week, Ted also spoke about how the upcoming King v. Burwell Supreme Court decision provides an opportunity for leadership. In the event the court rules the Obama Administration acted illegally in providing millions of Obamacare subsidies, Ted stated he opposes the approach advocated by some of continuing the subsidies through 2017. Instead he said, "I think the best legislative option is to allow states to opt out. I am cautiously optimistic that the Supreme Court will conclude in King v. Burwell that the Obama IRS disregarded the plain language of the statute and acted lawlessly. And when that occurs, it will be a real opportunity for Congress to lead. In a perfect world, we would take that opportunity to repeal Obamacare. At a minimum, we should allow states to opt out.”

We also wanted to make sure you saw this article from National Journal <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/national-journal-man-of-the-movement/> earlier this week. In it, Ted is deemed the "Man of the Movement" for his courtship of conservative leaders at a recent forum with six other presidential contenders. Ted was described as "pitch perfect" and it was noted he "blew everyone else out of the water." And perhaps most importantly, he laid out a real strategy to win. I hope you'll read it here <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/national-journal-man-of-the-movement/>.

As always, we thank you for your continued support -- together we'll reignite the promise of America!

All the best,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President

P.S. Next Friday, Ted will hold townhall meetings across Iowa, and if you're in the area, we'd love to have you there. Click here to find an event near you <https://www.tedcruz.org/iowa/>.
Press Clips

Ted Cruz Is Right x2
National Review Online <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/national-review-online-ted-cruz-is-right-x2/>

Cruz plans return to western Iowa
Des Moines Register <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/des-moines-register-cruz-plans-return-to-western-iowa/>

Ranking the 2016 presidential rollouts: Hillary got the most buzz, Cruz tops among Republicans
Washington Post <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/washington-post-ranking-the-2016-presidential-rollouts-hillary-got-the-most-buzz-cruz-tops-among-republicans/>

Ted Cruz team looks beyond Iowa, New Hampshire
Politico <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/politico-ted-cruz-team-looks-beyond-iowa-new-hampshire/>

Sen. Ted Cruz: Obama Has No Complete ISIS Strategy — Turkey Can Help
TIME <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/time-sen-ted-cruz-obama-has-no-complete-isis-strategy-turkey-can-help/>

Hot Air Poll: For Third Month in a Row, Ted Cruz is the Frontrunner
Townhall <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/townhall-hot-air-poll-for-third-month-in-a-row-ted-cruz-is-the-frontrunner/>

Cruz, Lee Move to Defend Marriage and Religious Liberty
Conservative Review <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/conservative-review-cruz-lee-move-to-defend-marriage-and-religious-liberty/>

In Raleigh, Ted Cruz takes presidential campaign to NCGOP convention
The News & Observer <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/the-news-observer-in-raleigh-ted-cruz-takes-presidential-campaign-to-ncgop-convention/>

Cruz Shames U.N. Over Anti-Israel Bias
Washington Free Beacon <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/washington-free-beacon-cruz-shames-u-n-over-anti-israel-bias/>
CRUZ VIDEOS

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uInF9eK3nvo>

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YDxxY7xvw2E>

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hrAwCGXRVno>

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GV38jCj_xVg>
Courageous Conservatives

Reigniting the Promise of America

Copyright 2015 All Rights Reserved | Privacy Policy <http://www.tedcruz.org/privacy-policy/>
PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www.tedcruz.org <http://www.tedcruz.org>
P.O. Box 25376, Houston, TX 77265 | (713) 353-4330

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may unsubscribe here: http://act.tedcruz.org/UnsubscribePage.html?mkt_unsubscribe=1&mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonvqTOZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4DTMFkI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: ⚾ My favorite game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| I'm proud to represent the winning team for the seventh year in a row. Friend -- Here's something you should know about me: I love baseball. I played all through high school and still love it when I get the chance to play. On Thursday night, I was proud to join the Congressional Democrats at the Congressional baseball game. It was a wonderful event for charity. And, in case you were wondering, we won. For the seventh year in a row. [](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27b2/738133e4/397a0ddf/7f9a2e97/1536007887/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-06-13_b1_pm_ldnd") But playing baseball isn't always about winning. It's about being part of a team, sportsmanship, and building relationships with my colleagues. Politics is another matter entirely. The difference between winning and losing can have a huge impact on the health and well-being of millions of Americans. That's why I need you on my team. We need to win. Will you join the team ahead of our big filing deadline at the end of this month? _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-06-13_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[Chip in $35 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: John Podesta, Hillary for America
subject: If you’re with Hillary, step up now:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Before Hillary takes the stage. |
Friend --

In just a few hours, Hillary will take the stage to launch this campaign -- a moment many of us have been waiting for, and it's finally here.

**[Hillary's going to be out there fighting for every vote in every state, and she needs us to fight for her.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI4MzYwNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMjQ0NzY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

So here’s my question: Are you with Hillary?

**If your answer is, "You bet I am," I hope you’ll contribute $1 right now to take this campaign to the next level:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI4MzYwNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMjQ0NzY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Let's not let this moment pass us by.

Thanks,

John

John Podesta
Chair
Hillary for America [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI4MzYwNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMjQ0NzY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: Lauren
subject: FWD: Get Your Copy of Unintimidated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI4MzMxOTMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMTgxMTQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI4MzMxOTMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMTgxMTQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,

We wanted to make sure you saw the Governor's message about your opportunity to own a copy of his book, Unintimidated.

[Your contribution of $60 or more will not only earn you a copy of his book, but help us fight for big, bold reforms across the country.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI4MzMxOTMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMTgxMTQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Quantities are limited, so act quickly to secure your copy.

Thanks,

Lauren
Our American Revival

**\---- Forwarded Message ----**
**From:** Governor Scott Walker
**Subject:** Get Your Copy of Unintimidated
**Date:** Thurs, June 11, 2015
Lauren,

It's time leaders in Washington take a cue from what we've been able to accomplish in the states.

In Wisconsin, we took on the Big Government Labor Bosses to put in place conservative reforms that have turned our state around -- creating jobs, unleashing opportunity and restoring hope to Wisconsin. If we can do it in Wisconsin, we can do it in states across the country.

I wrote my book, "Unintimidated" to help conservatives on the national stage learn from our success, and I'd like for you to have a copy. Unintimidated shares the story of our fight to save Wisconsin from a $3.6 billion budget deficit while simultaneously improving the state's schools and public infrastructure.
[
You can secure your copy with a contribution of $60 or more.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI4MzMxOTMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMTgxMTQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

[Your generous contribution today will support our fight for conservative reforms and help us restore power to the American taxpayer.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI4MzMxOTMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMTgxMTQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

I'm excited to share this with you, so I hope you'll take advantage of this special offer today.

Thanks,

Governor Scott Walker

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI4MzMxOTMS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMTgxMTQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

**
**

Paid for by Our American Revival

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Our American Revival. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Our American Revival's online community. If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Our American Revival, click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=22833193&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgxMTgxMTQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Hillary for America
subject: WATCH: Hillary’s big speech
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Help Hillary launch this campaign. | Hi there --

It's almost go time! Hillary will take the stage in New York City at 11:45 a.m. ET to officially launch this campaign and lay out her vision for the future of our country. **[You can watch her full speech LIVE here:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI4MzYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMjQ5NDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI4MzYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMjQ5NDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/live/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI4MzYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMjQ5NDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks for tuning in!

\-- Hillary for America

subject: It's not about me or Hillary Clinton
body:

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Time to go to work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
It's time to go to work. |
Friend --

I hope you're excited about the agenda I laid out today at our campaign's official launch event.

**Now it's time to go to work. Chip in $1 or more, and let's go win:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI4MzYyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMjU3NDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you,

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: Bernie's note
body:
Friend -
If you haven't had a chance to read Bernie's handwritten note from earlier today, please find it below.
Bernie was in Iowa throughout the day, where our campaign's momentum continues to build. Packed crowds in Cedar Rapids and Marshalltown heard him talk about obscene wealth and income inequality, getting big money out of politics, and much more.
After you read Bernie's letter, consider adding a $5 contribution to our campaign. I know it'd mean a lot to him. You can do that here:
**[https://go.berniesanders.com/Bernies_Letter](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21ae/43f17890/5efd2f41/621db5c5/2322016192/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernies-letter?refcode=em150613pm")**
Thanks,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager, Bernie 2016
